description: Import brick data from a previously exported file.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: Use itasca.command('brick import ...') via command interface

keywords.name: filename
keywords.description: Name of the file to be loaded. If not specified, then the file {“brick.p3brk” in 3D; “brick.p2brk” in 2D} is used. If no extension is given, the the extension {“.p3brk” in 3D; “.p2brk” in 2D} is used.

keywords.name: id
keywords.description: The ID of the imported brick will be set to i . An error is thrown if a brick with ID i already exists. If not specified, then the next available ID is used.
